ratings.instrument: long-term bank facilities (enhanced to INR205.08cr from INR75.05cr)
ratings.note: Reaffirmed CARE A-/Stable across LT bank facilities (INR205.08cr, up from INR75.05cr), LT/ST bank facilities (INR673cr, up from INR452cr, CARE A-/Stable / CARE A2+), and ST bank facilities (INR437cr, up from INR214cr, CARE A2+). Cites experienced promoters, reputed client base, unexecuted order book of INR1,260.87cr (1.96x FY25 TOI). Constrained by exposure to wholly-owned subsidiaries (Malwa Power Private Limited, DEE Fabricom India, DEE Piping Systems Thailand) still scaling up, working-capital-intensive operations, and raw-material price volatility. This is the only rating action found in the sources reviewed for this report -- no earlier baseline rating was located.
